meta.data_note: Unofficial election-night results by town. Round 1 first-choice only — full ranked-choice tabulation pending release of the official Cast Vote Record.

story.intro: Unofficial election-night first-choice results. Ranked-choice rounds will be added when the official CVR is released.

rounds.1: First-choice vote share by town on election night. Baldacci leads the field; no candidate cleared 50%, so the race will go to ranked-choice tabulation.
